behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names tools/split-file-verify path, .claude/skills/split-file/SKILL.md path, frontmatter fields (name, description, argument-hint), method format (Server).Start, TSV output, 16-hex SHA-256, sorted output, usage on no args, and skill content topics (git rename/rename, history, goimports, verify tool reference).

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes requirements (parse AST, output sorted TSV, etc.) without giving code or specific implementation lines.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check observable behavior (names extracted, sorted, hash equality, usage on stderr) rather than gold-specific identifiers; multiple implementations would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests build the Go binary and execute it via subprocess against test inputs, asserting on stdout/stderr behavior.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub returning empty would fail tests like test_verify_tool_extracts_func_decls (requires 'hello'/'world' in output) and test_verify_tool_produces_consistent_hashes.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover all instruction-stated behaviors: AST extraction, method receiver formatting, sorted output, multi-file, usage on no args, and SKILL.md frontmatter/content references.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are sectioned with comment headers (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Config file update tests) and named descriptively.

structured_data_schema.reason: TSV schema (name<TAB>sha256_hash, 16 hex chars, sorted) is documented in instruction.md.

no_typos.reason: Paths and commands appear consistent across instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction describes high-level requirements; doesn't reveal exact code lines.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: SKILL.md is a new file with bounded scope; doesn't conflict with other config.
